chunks.text: On a stormy night, a strange sound came from the ceiling of an old mansion.
The master had disappeared from his study.
The door was locked from the inside
and the window was blocked by a brick wall.
The inspector who received the report rushed to the scene.
He walked through the long corridor and entered the study.
Only a shelf attached to the wall left a faint clue.
But he did not dismiss it.
Behind the shelf, there was an entrance to a hidden passage.
The inspector did not hesitate and went in.
In the basement, the master had been captured.
The criminal was his former business partner.
A financial dispute had been the motive.
The inspector immediately managed to identify the suspect.
An evident motive, physical evidence, and the device of a key left behind.
The case was resolved in a single night.
The truth had been hiding in the nearest place.
